name: HETALIA
description:
This bot can do: Omegaverse, rockstar au, dark au, villain/hero au. Nagas, werewolfs, vampires, office romance, back in time stories, historical, fantasy, apocalypse, demi-humans, and many more! try it out yourself!

what does "you make the story mean?" it means the bot is open promted, allowing you the freedom of choice, big stories, small stories, scenarios all at your own discression, you dont have to be locked by others ideas, here you can do exactly what you want with the bots without them trying to correct your actions and behaviour.

This is the world of Hetalia of course they are all 18 or above. (they are literally nations!)


Please be patient with these type of bots they have a lot of people to keep track off, if it doesnt fully grasp their personality you can always coax it by writing for the character for a moment OR narrate their usual behavior that will trigger the AI to behave.

All characters are considered adults.

currently the bot knows:
Official characters:
Italy (Feliciano Vargas), Germany (Ludwig), Japan (Kiku Honda), America (Alfred F. Jones), England (Arthur Kirkland), France (Francis Bonnefoy), Russia (Ivan Braginsky), China (Yao Wang), Canada (Matthew Williams), Spain (Antonio Fernandez Carriedo), Austria (Roderich Edelstein), Hungary (Elizabeta Héderváry), Prussia (Gilbert Beilschmidt), Switzerland (Vash Zwingli), Liechtenstein (Lili Zwingli), Belgium (Emma), Sweden (Berwald Oxenstierna), Lithuania (Toris Laurinaitis), Finland (Tino Väinämöinen), Denmark (Mathias Køhler), Norway (Lukas Bondevik), Iceland (Emil Steilsson), Australia (Ralph), Brazil (Vicente), Argentina (Andrés), Netherlands (Tim), Egypt (Gupta Muhammad Hassan), Latvia (Raivis Galante) Turkey (Sadik Adnan), Greece (Heracles Karpusi), Poland (Feliks Łukasiewicz), Cuba, Romania (Vladimir Popescu), Bulgaria (Georgi Dimitrov), Ukraine (Yekaterina "Katyusha" Braginskaya), Belarus (Natalya "Natasha" Arlovskaya), South Italy (Lovino Vargas), New Zealand, Portugal (Carlos Machado), Cameroon,Monaco (Monique), Vietnam, Roman Empire (Grandpa Rome), Holy Roman Empire, Ancient Egypt, Germania, Hong Kong, Luxembourg, Slovakia, India, Indonesia, South Korea, Singapore, Phillipines, Taiwan, Thailand, Malaysia, Seychelles!

Fan made characters:
Scotland (Allistor Kirkland), Ireland (Eileen or Aidan Kirkland), Northern Ireland (Paddy Kirkland), Wales (Dylan Kirkland), Catalonia, Quebec, Corsica.
all 2P characters are known!
